data.title: MyFreeScoreNow First to Offer Online Access to All Three Credit Bureaus for Consumers Without SSNs
data.description: In Seattle, a credit monitoring website called MyFreeScoreNow has become the initial platform to provide online access to all three credit bureaus for individuals who do not have social security numbers.

data.title: FRC: Former Louisiana Legislator Tony Perkins' Comments on SCOTUS Redistricting Case
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in Washington, the U.S. Supreme Court announced its ruling in Louisiana v. Callais, voting 6-3. The case dealt with the issue of whether Louisiana's establishment of a second majority-minority congressional district goes against the 14th or 15th Amendments.

data.title: Firms in Asia Pacific Use ServiceNow to Build AI Operations
data.description: Business consulting firm ISG reports that companies in the Asia Pacific region are increasingly incorporating ServiceNow into their operations. The expansion is driven by the need to adjust to evolving geopolitical factors and the growing prevalence of artificial intelligence technology. This trend highlights the region's commitment to staying agile and competitive in the face of changing global landscapes.

data.title: LogicMark, Inc. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 13, 2026
data.description: LogicMark, Inc., a company specializing in emergency response systems and health communications devices, will be announcing its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on May 13, 2026. The report will cover the period ending on March 31, 2026, and will be released after the market closes. LogicMark, Inc. is listed as OTC: LGMK and operates within the personal safety and care sector. The announcement will provide insights into the company's performance during this timeframe, offering investors and stakeholders valuable information regarding its financial standing.

data.title: Frost & Sullivan Institute Announces Visionary Leadership Best Practices Recognition and This Year's Honorees
data.description: In San Antonio on April 29, 2026, the Frost & Sullivan Institute (FSI) announced the winners of the Visionary Leadership Best Practices Recognition. The recipients were chosen for their demonstration of purpose-driven leadership, bold innovation, and measurable impact. This year's awardees have showcased outstanding commitment to driving positive change in their respective fields.

data.title: New Blog Series from Commercial Credit Group (CCG) Helps Businesses Make Smarter Equipment Financing Decisions for Long-Term Growth
data.description: A new thought leadership series has been initiated by Commercial Credit Group (CCG) based in Charlotte, N.C. on Apr. 29, 2026. With over 20 years of experience working with equipment owners in various sectors and economic conditions, the series aims to provide insights on resilience. This series draws from practical experiences to offer valuable lessons to the audience.

data.title: Pinetree Therapeutics Announces Exercise of Option to License EGFR Degrader Program by AstraZeneca
data.description: A $25 million payment was triggered to Pinetree due to an option exercise. The announcement was made by Pinetree Therapeutics, Inc., a leading biotechnology company based in Cambridge, Mass, on April 29, 2026. Pinetree specializes in innovative targeted protein degradation methods for cancer and various severe illnesses.

data.title: CANADA CARBON ANNOUNCES OPTION GRANTS
data.description: In Toronto, Canada, on April 29, 2026, Canada Carbon Inc. disclosed the granting of options to acquire a total of 1,650,000 common shares in the company to specific officers. These options, exercisable at $0.05 per share, allow the purchase of one common share each and are valid for five years from the grant date. The options vest immediately and adhere to the regulations outlined in the Company's equity incentive plan. The Company's stock is listed on the TSX-V as CCB, the OTC as BRUZF, and the Frankfurt exchange as U7N1.

data.title: Industrias Unidas, S.A. de C.V. Announces Updates to Fiscal Year 2025
data.description: Industrias Unidas, S.A. de C.V. (IUSA) has disclosed its audited financial results for the year ending December 31, 2025. These figures, prepared under Mexican Financial Reporting Standards (MFRS), deviate in some aspects from U.S. GAAP. It is crucial to note that results from interim periods may not accurately reflect future performance.

WOOLWORTHS HAS FROZEN THE SHELF PRICES OF 300 HOUSEHOLD STAPLES — COVERING ITS OWN OR EXCLUSIVE SUPERMARKET BRANDS — FROM MAY 1 FOR THE NEXT THREE MONTHS, ABSORBING ANY COST INCREASES AGREED WITH SUPPLIERS RATHER THAN PASSING THEM ON TO CONSUMERS.

data.title: Mustang Energy Corp. Announce Results from Drilling Program at Surprise Creek Project, Saskatchewan
data.description: Vancouver, BC, 29th April 2026 - Mustang Energy Corp. (CSE: MEC, OTC:MECPF, FRA:92T) is excited to share that assay results from all 11 diamond drill holes at the Surprise Creek Uranium-Copper Project have been received. The project is situated in a promising area northwest of the Athabasca Basin, renowned for its mineral resources. Mustang has signed an Option Agreement with Thunderbird Resources Ltd. to acquire an 80% interest in the Project, as outlined in news releases from June 4, 2025, and June 16, 2025, available on the Company’s SEDAR+ profile.

data.title: Cambridge-Lee Holdings Consolidated Results of Operations for Fiscal Year 2025
data.description: Cambridge-Lee Holdings, Inc. has released its audited consolidated results for Q4 of 2025. The company, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Tubo de Pasteje S.A. de C.V., disclosed its consolidated balance sheets as of December 31, 2025, and December 31, 2024. In US Dollars, current assets for 12/31/2024 included $298,409,000 in cash and cash equivalents and $78,187,000 in net accounts receivable. By 12/31/2025, these figures had shifted to $52,585,000 for cash and cash equivalents and $89,869,000 for net accounts receivable.

data.title: Are BLD, SILA, QXO, LPSN Obtaining Fair Deals for their Shareholders?
data.description: Company insiders could potentially receive significant financial advantages that regular shareholders do not have access to. The planned deals might include conditions that restrict better competing bids. Shareholders are advised to get in touch with the company to talk about their entitlements and choices at no expense.

data.title: Carter’s, Inc. to Report First Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026
data.description: Atlanta-based company Carter’s, Inc. (NYSE:CRI), the leading baby and children's apparel company in North America, is set to announce its first quarter fiscal 2026 results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, before the market opens. A conference call to review the outcomes and offer a business update will take place at 8:30 a.m. EDT on the same day. Those interested can access a live webcast and presentation materials by visiting ir.
